Name: Kit Review
Description: Fields: photo (Image), quote, name, meta. Used by featured_reviews.

Name: Kit FAQ
Description: Fields: question, answer (multi-line). Used by featured_faqs.

Name: Kit Step
Description: Fields: title, description, icon (Image). Used by featured_steps.

Name: Kit Component
Description: Fields: name, description, icon (Image). Used by featured_components.

Name: Kit Trust Card
Description: Fields: heading, description, icon (Image). Used by featured_trust_cards.

Name: Kit Quick Benefit
Description: Fields: heading, description, icon (Image). Used by featured_quick_benefits.

Name: Kit Comparison Row
Description: Fields: left_heading, left_subtext, right_heading, right_subtext. Used by featured_comparison_rows.

Name: Kit Reel
Description: Fields: video, poster, caption, author_handle. Used by featured_reels. (`handle` is reserved by Shopify.)

Name: Hero Trust Strip
Description: Short trust items below the ATC button.

Name: Help Note
Description: Helper text beside the size-chart link.

Name: Companion Size Product
Description: Sister product at a different capacity.

Description: Up to 3 Pair It With products.

Name: Comparison Intro
Description: Intro paragraph above the comparison table.

Name: Benefits Icons
Description: Icons parallel to Quick Benefits cards.

Name: Trust Strip Icons
Description: Icons parallel to Trust Row cards.

Name: SEO Description Override
Description: Optional override for the meta description.
